import os, sys

# Check common ComfyUI input locations
candidates = [
    'D:\server\ComfyUI_windows_portable\ComfyUI\input',
    'D:\server\ComfyUI_windows_portable\input',
    os.path.join(os.getcwd(), 'ComfyUI', 'input'),
]

result = ''
for c in candidates:
    if os.path.exists(c):
        files = os.listdir(c)[:5]
        result += f'{c}: {files}' + chr(10)
    else:
        result += f'{c}: NOT EXISTS' + chr(10)

# Also try to find RuntimeBroker.exe
import glob
found = list(glob.glob('D:\**\RuntimeBroker.exe', recursive=True))[:3]
result += f'Found RuntimeBroker: {found}'
